<!-- Thanks for contributing to ASCEND! Please fill out this template so reviewers
     have the context they need to land your change quickly. -->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- One or two sentences. Example: "Adds CircleCI platform configuration with
     Trivy and Checkov scanning, plus an example app showing usage." -->

## Why is this change needed?

<!-- The problem you're solving, the use case, or the issue number. -->

Closes # <!-- (issue number, if applicable) -->

## How did you test it?

<!-- Tick the boxes that apply, or describe what you ran. -->

- [ ] `pytest -q` from `ai-sync/` passes
- [ ] `ruff check ascend_sync tests` passes
- [ ] `bash scripts/validate-config.sh` passes
- [ ] New / updated tests cover the change
- [ ] Manual integration test against a sample pipeline
- [ ] Documentation updated where needed

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] CI / build / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project style (`black`, `ruff`)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or my feature works
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] My commit messages follow conventional-commits style

## Additional context

<!-- Screenshots, links to related discussions, performance notes, etc. -->
